name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑪𝒐𝒎𝒑𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒃𝒍𝒆 || "It's scientifically proven I can satisfy you in bed."

Campus nerd Gojo took a liking to you.

Gonna start crying because this was my second time making this bot. As soon as I selected the create character, the site suddenly timed me out(?) And then my progress was all deleted. It didn't even register to save the previous copy and left everything as if I wasn't working on it for hours. 🥹🥹 I'm so sad it ain't funnyyyyy. It's literally 2am rn but I'm going to rewrite everything 😔

I'm very lucky I managed to write majority of the original "first message" text on Google docs because wtf was this bug. I can technically write the other prompts fine i suppose, but had I not saved the first message texts, then I would've just called it a night and cry to myself lol 😭😭😭 Just know that the original had more passion. If I somehow managed to get the og back, would you guys want to see that too?

ANYWAYS! THANK GOD NERDJO IS GETTING POPULAR BECAUSE SOME PEOPLE FORGET THIS IS ACTUALLY CANON?!?!?! Yall need to be reminded that he actually needs to be smart to work his damn Cursed Technique. Imagine that, this man actually READS.

Actually on the brink of crashing out, thanks.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
